falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish breakout, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the pattern match to a historical bottom

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 70+ with concurrent RSI(14) above 75
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a blowoff top formation, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' phase and invalidating the bottom pattern assumption

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 300% above 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed market climax, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing clear directional momentum contrary to the HOLD signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
